title: cousinia khorramabadensis var. khorramabadensis
intro: Cousinia khorramabadensis var. khorramabadensis is a rare and endemic plant species native to Iran, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cousinia khorramabadensis var. khorramabadensis include its potential use in treating digestive issues, wounds, and infections, as well as its antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of this plant, including extracts and infusions, have been traditionally used in Iranian folk medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
